module_info.docstring:
Extraction protocols for intermap.

Defines the FileExtractor protocol that decouples analysis modules from
specific extraction implementations (tree-sitter, hybrid, etc.).

classes.name: FunctionInfo
classes.docstring: Lightweight function info for extraction results.

classes.name: ClassInfo
classes.docstring: Lightweight class info for extraction results.

classes.name: FileExtractionResult
classes.docstring: Result of extracting structure from a source file.

classes.name: FileExtractor
classes.docstring: Protocol for extracting code structure from files.

methods.name: extract
methods.docstring:
Extract functions, classes, and imports from a source file.

Returns:
    FileExtractionResult with functions, classes, imports.
